title: Galaxy Defenders (Classic TD)
description:
Aliens are invading — and you're the last line of defense.

Build, upgrade, and strategize your way to victory in this tower defense game where every decision matters. Place towers smartly across each map, adapt your tactics to different enemy types, and defend your portal from the incoming waves.

Features:• 🛡️ 7 Unique Towers — each with distinct abilities and upgrade paths

• 🌍 20 Handcrafted Maps with varied layouts and challenges

• ⚙️ Strategic Gameplay — every tower placement and upgrade decision counts

• 🛒 In-Game Shop — earn currency through gameplay to unlock new upgrades

• 🎧 Custom Sound & Music — immersive audio to accompany the chaos

This game is completed and new content may be planned. Your feedback can directly shape the future of the game — join the community and help us make it even better!
description_short: A classic tower defense game set in space! Build and upgrade towers, defend your portal from waves of alien invaders, and outsmart evolving threats across handcrafted and procedural maps.
